llm_instruction: This file contains only BASF jobs in Indonesia. Filter this file before loading wider Asia data. For role-specific searches, use the field JSON files when available. Copy job URLs exactly and never generate basf.jobs links.

jobs.title: I/E Engineer or Sr I/E Technician
jobs.description: Objectives: To support Production, Utility, QC, PPIC, and QC-Lab Department Main Responsibility: EHS Process Safety related: Comply and follow all EHS regulations Work safely in accordance with the occupational safety rules applicable at PT BASF Indonesia, Merak plant. Production related: To install, replace, and repair Instrument and Electrical equipment at the Merak factory To repair and perform analysis to solve problems in Instrument and Electrical equipment Carry out maintenance activities on Instrument and Electrical equipment and installations Calibrate Instrument and Electrical equipment according to the existing schedule and procedures. Support production, projects, PPIC, utility, and also QC activities at the Merak factory To prepare daily work reports in the Instrument and Electrical department Perform maintenance on electrical equipment at the Merak factory and also its electrical building. Administrative: Report production cycle time Create Work Order for maintenance in production area Create Root Cause Analysis for deviation in production process Requirements: Minimum Bachelor/Diploma degree majoring Electrical Engineering/ Instrumentation / Engineering Physics Minimu

jobs.title: DCS Operator
jobs.description: Tujuan Umum Posisi Ini: Bertanggung jawab penuh terhadap kelancaran proses produksi untuk mendapatkan produk sesuai dengan target produksi yang sudah ditetapkan. Target ini baik dalam kuantitas, kualitas, ketepatan waktu dan juga keamanan proses Bertanggung jawab penuh terhadap semua peraturan dan prosedur EHS (Environmental, Health, Safety) yang sudah ditetapkan. Tanggung Jawab utama dan Kegiatan Utama: EHS: Mengikuti semua peraturan dan prosedur EHS yang berlaku Menjalankan tugas sebagai Fire Brigade dengan baik Menjalankan tugas sebagai Petugas K3 Utama Ruang Terbatas dengan baik Menjalankan tugas sebagai tim HAZMAT dengan baik Memberi masukan ke atasan terkait persoalan safety di area kerja Produksi: Menjalankan proses produksi sehingga berjalan dengan aman selama waktu shift Mencapai target produksi sesusai kualitas dan kuantitas yang diinginkan Menjalankan proses produksi sesuai dengan prosedur produksi dan petunjuk kerja yang diberikan Menjaga semua peralatan proses produksi dan penunjang nya serta area kerja selalu dalam kondisi baik, bersih dan menjalakan praktik pemeliharaan (housekeeping) serta 5S dengan baik Menjalankan tugas dengan baik sebagai Operator Forklift Mengop

jobs.title: Industry Manager, ASEAN
jobs.description: Job Objectives : Industry Manager, ASEAN is responsible for leading and driving the overall sales strategy, business growth, and market expansion across the ASEAN sub-region for Dispersion Business Unit (Fiber Bonding Adhesive, Paper Carpet Dispersion Industry). This role oversee sub-regional sales operations, key account management, revenue growth, and customer relationship development while ensuring alignment with the company’s business objectives and profitability targets. The role requires strong leadership capabilities, strategic planning, and hands-on execution to achieve sustainable growth and strengthen the company’s market presence across ASEAN countries. Key Responsibilities Sales Strategy Business Growth Develop and implement sub-region sales strategies to achieve revenue and profitability targets across ASEAN markets. Identify new business opportunities, market trends, and customer needs to expand the company’s market share. Drive sales growth through strategic partnerships, channel development, and key account acquisition. Monitor market conditions, competitor activities, and pricing strategies to maintain competitiveness. Sub-Region Sales Management Lead, coach, and m

jobs.title: Assistant Manager, Technology, Asia Pacific
jobs.description: Objectives: Responsible for supporting implementation of formulation technology transfer to own sites and contract manufacturers (CM) in APA including consistency check and update of technical database. Responsible for providing technical support and troubleshooting to own sites and contract manufacturers, support as technology subject matter expert in terms of chemical handling and process related topics. Support Senior Manager, Technology, Asia Pacific for all FFP (Formulation, Filling Packaging) projects (both Capital Investment and Operational Excellence) at APA own sites and contract manufacturers Support in updating/ aligning APA Formulants strategy with APA Operations and Global Formulant teams, including implementation of follow up actions on Formulant Risk Management and cost optimization initiative. Main Tasks: Technical Management Facilitate formulation technology transfer to own sites and contract manufacturers in APA in collaboration with APT/TF, APR/D, APT/Q, APA/OP (Site Managers and/or Sub-regional Contract Manufacturing Managers) for both existing and new product introductions, ensure high standard of reliability and integrity for own sites and contract manufacture

jobs.title: Production Engineer
jobs.description: Objectives of the Position: Responsible for and ensuring that the production process runs efficiently and effectively. Comply and follow all EHS regulations Main Tasks: EHS Process Safety related: Comply and follow all EHS regulations Act as the work permit issuer (G1) in the production area according to the work permit matrix and other designated areas. Providing feedback to the superiors regarding safety issues in the work area. Using personal protective equipment (PPE) according to the Safe Work Guidelines or PPE Matrix Production related: Checking the completeness of the batch card used for daily production activities. Conduct monthly meeting related to safety, quality, and issues in the production area. Create the Minutes of Meeting for the monthly meeting. To check and revise if necessary; HIRA, Procedures, Working Instructions, and Work Checklists every 6 (six) months. To check the changes made in the batch card before they are implemented in production and to monitor and report the results of the changes. To prepare written procedures for trial, rework, and recycling of products that are not listed in the batch card. To conduct daily production meetings with the Shift Leade

jobs.title: Sales Manager
jobs.description: Objectives of the Position: Focus on maintaining and developing BASF Chemical Catalysts business in Indonesia. Sales activities to achieve business targets. Collect and analyze market information; develop key account strategies. Build relationships with engineering companies, associations, and producers. Maintain good relationships with key customers; solve supply and other problems. Coordinate with other functions for customer support. Support technology managers and contribute to product innovation. Main Tasks: Networking Relationship Building Strong networking skills to develop new contacts and deepen relationships with existing customers and industry stakeholders. Active participation in industry events, seminars, and associations relevant to chemical catalysts in Indonesia. Farming Existing Business Proactively identify growth opportunities within existing accounts, ensuring high customer retention and satisfaction. Regularly review customer portfolios to upsell and cross-sell BASF solutions. Create barriers for competitive entries in existing accounts and maintain high margins at existing customers. Hunting for New Business Identify and pursue new business opportunities in wh

jobs.title: Mechanical Technician (Leasing) 1
jobs.description: Main Responsibilities: Memastikan bahwa kegiatan pemeliharaan tidak mengganggu atau menimbulkan masalah bagi perusahaan dan lingkungan Memastikan semua peraturan dan ketentuan kesehatan dan keselamatan kerja sesuai dengan undang-undang pemerintah dan protokol perusahaan Menerapkan kebijakan dan standar keselamatan di tempat kerja Memastikan bahwa tempat dan fasilitas perusahaan dijaga dalam kondisi baik Mengawasi vendor luar untuk pelaksanaan pekerjaan pemeliharaan jika ditugaskan Mengikuti prosedur pemeliharaan (SOP) dan instruksi kerja (WI) Melaksanakan perintah kerja yang didelegasikan sesuai jadwal dengan kualitas yang baik Memastikan semua alat digunakan dengan benar dan aman Bertanggung jawab atas pemecahan masalah peralatan Meminta dan menutup izin sebagai sistem Melakukan penggantian suku cadang peralatan sesuai standar Memastikan bengkel aman, rapi, dan bersih Melaporkan kegiatan sehari-hari Job Requirement: Pengalaman Kerja: Diploma dengan 3-5 tahun di bidang teknik mesin/fabrication/machinary Sarjana dengan pengalaman 1-2 tahun di bidang yang sama teknik mesin/fabrication/machinary Pengetahuan Teknis Profesional: Memiliki pengetahuan teknis dalam memecahkan masalah siste

jobs.title: Electrical Technician (Leasing)
jobs.description: Main Responsibilities: Memastikan bahwa kegiatan pemeliharaan tidak mengganggu atau menimbulkan masalah bagi perusahaan dan lingkungan Memastikan semua peraturan dan ketentuan kesehatan dan keselamatan kerja sesuai dengan undang-undang pemerintah dan protokol perusahaan Menerapkan kebijakan dan standar keselamatan di tempat kerja Memastikan bahwa tempat dan fasilitas perusahaan dijaga dalam kondisi baik Mengawasi vendor luar untuk pelaksanaan pekerjaan pemeliharaan jika ditugaskan Mengikuti prosedur pemeliharaan (SOP) dan instruksi kerja (WI) Melaksanakan perintah kerja yang didelegasikan sesuai jadwal dengan kualitas yang baik Memastikan semua alat digunakan dengan benar dan aman Bertanggung jawab atas pemecahan masalah peralatan Meminta dan menutup izin sebagai sistem Melakukan penggantian suku cadang peralatan sesuai standar Memastikan bengkel aman, rapi, dan bersih Melaporkan kegiatan sehari-hari Job Requirement: Pengalaman Kerja: Diploma dengan 3-5 tahun di bidang yang sama Sarjana dengan pengalaman 1-2 tahun di bidang yang sama Pengetahuan Teknis Profesional: Memiliki pengalaman dalam perbaikan motor, perkabelan, control valve, aktuator Memiliki kemampuan terkait instrumentas
